title: Sequential Compactness in Metric Spaces
description: A flowchart illustrating the relationship between different concepts of compactness and the implications of sequential compactness.
relationships: A sequentially compact metric space guarantees that every sequence (xₙ) has a convergent subsequence (xₙₖ) that converges to a limit point p in X. This property is equivalent to compactness (Heine-Borel) in metric spaces.
